short.subject: Prospective 2029 OH — Sofia Reyes
short.body:
Coach Speraw,

My name is Sofia Reyes — outside hitter, Class of 2029, SC Rockstar 16U out of Los Angeles.

Quick stats: 94% dig pct, 98% pass pct, 4.2 digs/set. National rank #89. GPA 3.9.

I'd love to learn more about UCLA's program and any fit for the 2029 class.

Thank you,
Sofia Reyes | SC Rockstar 16U | #3 | Class of 2029

fit.subject: Sofia Reyes — OH 2029 — UCLA Interest
fit.body:
Coach Speraw,

I'm Sofia Reyes, a Class of 2029 outside hitter with SC Rockstar 16U in Los Angeles. UCLA has been my top school for years — I've attended two home matches at Pauley Pavilion and love what your staff has built.

I'm 5'10", right-handed, 94% dig percentage, 98% pass accuracy. National rank #89. GPA 3.9. I'm committed to both the academic rigor and the competitive standard UCLA demands.

I'd be grateful for a chance to connect.

Sofia Reyes | Class of 2029 | SC Rockstar 16U

fit.subject: Sofia Reyes — OH 2029 — Long Beach State Interest
fit.body:
Long Beach State Coaching Staff,

I'm Sofia Reyes, a Class of 2029 outside hitter with SC Rockstar 16U in Los Angeles. Long Beach State has been on my list since I started playing club — the Big West is exactly the competitive environment I'm looking for.

I'm 5'10", right-handed, 94% dig percentage, 98% pass accuracy, national rank #89, GPA 3.9. I'm a student-athlete in the true sense and would fit Long Beach's academic culture well.

Hope to connect soon.

Sofia Reyes | Class of 2029 | SC Rockstar 16U

short.subject: Thank You — Sofia Reyes, OH 2029
short.body:
Pepperdine Coaching Staff,

Thank you for the offer — I'm extremely excited about the opportunity to join the Waves. Pepperdine has been a dream school.

I look forward to our next conversation and visiting campus to get a better feel for the program.

Sofia Reyes | OH | Class of 2029 | SC Rockstar 16U | Natl #89 | GPA 3.9

fit.subject: Sofia Reyes — Pepperdine Visit Follow-Up
fit.body:
Pepperdine Coaching Staff,

Thank you so much for the offer and for the time you've invested in recruiting me. Pepperdine checks every box — the academic reputation, Malibu, the WCC competition level, and most importantly, the culture your staff has built.

I'd love to schedule a campus visit as soon as possible to take the next step.

Sofia Reyes | OH | Class of 2029 | SC Rockstar 16U | Natl #89 | GPA 3.9

short.subject: Follow-Up — Sofia Reyes, OH 2029
short.body:
UC San Diego Coaching Staff,

Stats: 94% dig pct, 98% pass pct, 4.2 digs/set. National rank #89. GPA 3.9.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Sofia Reyes | OH | Class of 2029 | SC Rockstar 16U

fit.subject: Sofia Reyes — UCSD Visit Follow-Up
fit.body:
UC San Diego Coaching Staff,

I wanted to follow up after my visit in February. Meeting your staff and seeing the facilities reinforced how strong a fit UCSD would be. The academics are outstanding, and your competitive trajectory in the Big West is exciting.

As a outside hitter focused on precision and court IQ — 94% dig pct, 98% pass pct, national rank #89 — I believe I'd contribute immediately at the D1 level.

I'd love to continue the conversation.

Sofia Reyes | OH | Class of 2029 | SC Rockstar 16U | GPA 3.9
